reviews.review_description:
Had some difficulties with ‘grabbing’ the cards. But when I played a bit, I noticed that you have to point at them, and then grab them.

Played easy and normal mode. I found normal mode hard (couldn’t win 🫣). So went back to easy mode. To climb the leaderboard….

Select your warrior and start attacking the enemies and their castle. When you have enough money, you can buy power ups, more building to get your coins or potion up.

Nice game.

reviews.review_title: Easy hu?  Devs have to look up easy
reviews.review_description:
Nice game. I love well balanced tower defense.  The last few levels are super hard to a point i just uninstalled. Even on easy level.  You know what easy means?  I pay, i finish the game. I am happy. I leave a good review.  Plus the money you win in this game doesnt give any advantages since the stronger fighters are more expensive.  A third money generator should be available. I like to finish games but this one is just impossible on easy level.

  The fortress of goblin on EASY level is impossible to pass.  Too bad, the game has potential.  I tried mana, money, defense, big guys, small guys, meteors, anvils, portals.  Nope.

Edit 2:  any changes?  I was able to defeat the fortress of goblins.  From 1 to 5 stars

developer_response.body: Yes, we’ve released a small update. A more detailed one will be coming soon. Enjoy the game!

reviews.review_description: The concept is entertaining. My issue is with both interactions and overall graphical polish.
Love tower Defence games. This is simple and nicely done devs I like it 👌

developer_response.body: Thank you for your nice review :)

reviews.review_description: Wasn’t expecting too much from an early game, but I’m actually really enjoying the game. Love the layout and the animations, as well as the leveling up for new character and items. Easy to jump on for a few minutes when you don’t have a lot of time. One of the better relaxing tower defense games I’ve tried on here. Can’t wait to get more characters and get past some of the other levels. Nice job on the game. Look forward to future updates.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your kind feedback. I’ll continue working on updates :)

reviews.review_description:
Awesome game!
Looking forward to the next update.

18.7.2025 9:37 am CET! I am a new leader, first player over 10000 points.
Game is nice.
Please add levels.
For the most difficult level od first page are the best Rakhai, Silvio and Khazakhiro.
Add more lines.
Characters and magics are useful.
Buildings and defence useless. It is useful from second page of levels.
Do you want to test new version? Write me. ;)

19.7.2025 3:15 pm CET! Over 60k points.
It is nonsense to open next level, if you win easy difficulty. Better to split difficulties to separate levels I think. Do player must go throught all difficulties.
Add price of characters and items in the game (gold coins) to their description. It is awful when you choose bad character to buy. After one day you have all items in game, so more important for you is not lose a player on the start of playing of the game.
Show description of items without full picture, it is awful to click repeatadly to see characters specification/values.
Balance winning prize difficulties and previous levels.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your nice comment :). We're working on updates. Congratulations on your score as well!

reviews.review_description:
There's a lot to like with King's Land and a few things that need work but overall this is a good strategy tower attack/defence tabletop game. The first map can be completed easily once you're into the swing of things but expect to grind the last battle a few times to get enough gold to move to the 2nd map.  The difficulty does ramp up from that point but if you don't mind a bit of a grind to buy better cards then you'll get your money's worth!

Check out my first impressions gameplay over on my YouTube!
😁✌️☮️❤️

developer_response.body: Thank you for your valuable opinions and YouTube review :)
